  "findings": [
    "Splice made outside of an approved electrical box or enclosure",
    "Exposed conductor insulation and splice connections vulnerable to physical damage",
    "Violation of standard electrical safety codes for containing arcs and sparks"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the affected circuit immediately",
    "Install an approved junction box or enclosure at the splice location",
    "Re-make the splice inside the enclosure using approved connectors",
    "Inspect the conductors for physical damage before re-terminating"
  ],
  "rationale": "A splice made outside of an approved electrical box or enclosure is a severe code violation and safety hazard. Junction boxes are required to contain sparks, arcs, or heat from a failing connection and to protect the splice from physical damage and environmental exposure.",

    "NEC 110.14",
    "NEC 300.15"
  ]
}
